tieBreakingRule.text:
In the event that two (or more) teams have an equal number of points, the following rules break the tie:

1. Number of victories
2. Goal difference
3. Goals scored

nameTranslation.ar: الدوري البرازيلي، الدرجة C، المجموعة B
